strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Demonstrated knowledge sharing through workshops, talks, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, products, or platforms — only brief recent agent tooling work
Lacks director-level / principal IC scope: no evidence of strategic advisory, executive influence, or cross-org technical leadership
No cloud platform depth at scale (limited AWS mention, no GCP/Azure architecture leadership)

key_factors.factor: Principal/Director IC scope and strategic influence
Long engineering tenure and polyglot breadth

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior/staff engineer with strong craftsmanship, teaching instincts, and 15+ years of hands-on delivery, but the role demands recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products at scale, and director-level strategic influence with customers and partners. Recent MCP/agent work is promising but thin, and there is no evidence of cloud/AI platform leadership at the principal tier required here.
